hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
tool_input = json.loads(sys.argv[1])
path = tool_input.get('file_path', '')
danger_patterns = [r'\.env$', r'\.env\.', r'agents\.yaml$', r'settings\.local\.json$']
for p in danger_patterns:
    if re.search(p, path):
        print(f'BLOCKED: Writing to {path} requires explicit confirmation. This file affects production.')
        sys.exit(1)
sys.exit(0)
"
hooks.description: Block writes to .env, agents.yaml, and Claude settings without confirmation

hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
tool_input = json.loads(sys.argv[1])
cmd = tool_input.get('command', '')
danger_patterns = [
    r'DROP\s+TABLE',
    r'DROP\s+SCHEMA',
    r'TRUNCATE\s+TABLE',
    r'DELETE\s+FROM\s+contacts',
    r'DELETE\s+FROM\s+scores',
    r'DELETE\s+FROM\s+blueprints',
    r'rm\s+-rf',
    r'pkill\s+-9',
]
for p in danger_patterns:
    if re.search(p, cmd, re.IGNORECASE):
        print(f'BLOCKED: Destructive command detected. Review and confirm explicitly before running.')
        sys.exit(1)
sys.exit(0)
"
hooks.description: Block destructive SQL (DROP TABLE, TRUNCATE) and dangerous shell commands

hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess, re
tool_input = json.loads(sys.argv[1])
path = tool_input.get('file_path', '')
if re.search(r'omerion/.*\.py$', path):
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['python3', '-m', 'py_compile', path],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    if result.returncode != 0:
        print(f'SYNTAX ERROR in {path}:')
        print(result.stderr)
        sys.exit(2)
    print(f'Syntax OK: {path}')
sys.exit(0)
"
hooks.description: Auto-syntax-check all Python files under omerion/ after every write

hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re, subprocess, os
tool_input = json.loads(sys.argv[1])
path = tool_input.get('file_path', '')
if not re.search(r'omerion/.*\.py$', path):
    sys.exit(0)
# Find nearest tests/ dir relative to the edited file
d = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(path))
for _ in range(6):
    t = os.path.join(d, 'tests')
    if os.path.isdir(t):
        result = subprocess.run(
            ['python3', '-m', 'pytest', t, '-q', '--tb=short', '-x', '--timeout=30'],
            capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60
        )
        out = (result.stdout + result.stderr)[-800:]
        print(out)
        sys.exit(0)
    d = os.path.dirname(d)
print('No tests/ dir found — skipped')
sys.exit(0)
"
hooks.description: Auto-run pytest on nearest test directory after editing any omerion .py file
